title: Mastering Magic
description: A magical modpack featuring numerous quests designed to help you learn and master each magic mod perfectly.
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mastering_Magic/BH_MMagic_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mastering-magic) version.** ## Mastering Magic was originally a modpack inspired by Snifferish’s famous YouTube series, but it has since become much more than that. It features a wide variety of magic and adventure mods to give you a truly amazing gameplay experience. This is a modpack focused on magic, but it adds much more than that, for example, famous mods like Ice and Fire have been added, and without a doubt, you will be able to live a real adventure in the lands of Minecraft. In addition, it includes quests for the most important mods, and if you’re a beginner or simply want to set some goals for yourself, these quests will be a great help.

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mastering_Magic/BH_MMagic_summary.webp) This is a magic modpack, made up of the best magic complements, as well as a lot of RPG, adventure and combat mods, inspired by the famous Snifferish series, but with some other mods to improve the game experience even more. Without a doubt, it is an ideal modpack for magic lovers, since the possibilities are practically endless, you can learn new spells, conquer new places, perform summoning, and much more. What are you waiting for to play it? ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mastering_Magic/BH_MMagic_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to increase the RAM in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mastering_Magic/BH_MMagic_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/36BOkCVH/images/2aed4de98f34f26ad721b317903e002999ca2387.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/36BOkCVH/images/606e2e988aac381a1f49f4121e65b7b63ff257cc.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/36BOkCVH/images/b49d8cd9791a6054ef51c5f5faef09340b9b4619.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/36BOkCVH/images/edc1fb73f800ca3cace99ef54dc4743818547ad2.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
